productDisplayName: Q&Q Kids Unisex Blue Dial Watch
description: Case style: Pink plastic round case with a fancy bezel Dial style: Blue dial with yellow and blue hands and print on the dial Strap style: Pink plastic strap with a tang clasp Features: Branding on the 9 hour mark and a screw to reset time Water resistance to 10 BAR, wearable around sinks, during swimming, poolside diving but not highboard diving and surfing Warranty: 1 year
